messages.content: Testing S3 backup with new error logging

It sounds like you're working on a technical task, and I want to be transparent that my capabilities are focused on a different area. My purpose as CARE Bot is to offer support and information to forensic nursing patients, helping them connect with medical, social, and mental health follow-up care after a difficult experience.

If you or someone you know is seeking guidance or resources related to medical follow-up, emotional support, or understanding options after a forensic exam, I am here to help in a safe and supportive way. Your well-being is important, and I want to ensure you get the right kind of assistance.
